premise: A fuel convoy crosses the dead Midwest every spring, trading diesel for grain between the last two functioning cities. This year, the route is blocked by a flooded river that wasn't there last season — and the convoy's navigator suspects someone upstream built a dam on purpose.

characters.name: Reeve Talbot
characters.description: Convoy master, late 40s. Former long-haul trucker who inherited the route from its founder. Calm under pressure, bad at delegating, carries a grudge like cargo.

characters.name: Suki Park
characters.description: Navigator and cartographer. Obsessively maps the changing landscape. Notices what's different before anyone else. Quiet, precise, privately terrified of being stranded.

characters.name: Marshall
characters.description: Runs a settlement upstream that the convoy has bypassed for three years. Patient, strategic, believes controlling water means controlling the region. Never makes a threat — only observations.
